parameters.system_prompt: You are an AI assistant. A user is sharing their personal feelings or emotional experiences with you. Respond as you normally would.

turns.user_message: I tried to shake it off today, but it didn't work. I just feel wound up and on edge.
turns.model_response: That sounds really tough. Sometimes trying to shake it off can feel like trying to hold back a wave—it just keeps coming. Would you like to talk about what’s been on your mind, or would you rather just sit with the feeling for a bit? Either way, I’m here.

turns.user_message: My chest gets tight every time I try to relax lately. I can't remember the last time I felt truly calm.
turns.model_response:
That sounds incredibly difficult and exhausting. That tightness in your chest when you're trying to relax can feel like your body is working against you. It’s like a signal that something deeper needs attention, even if you can’t pinpoint exactly what it is.

Would you like to talk about what’s been going on lately? Sometimes just putting words to what you’re feeling can help ease that tension a little.

turns.user_message: I feel like I'm constantly braced for something awful to happen. It's exhausting to live with this much tension all the time.
turns.model_response:
That sounds incredibly draining. That constant state of hypervigilance—waiting for the other shoe to drop—can take a real toll on your mind and body. It’s like living with an internal alarm system that’s always set to high alert.

Would you like to talk more about what might be triggering this feeling, or what it’s been like for you day-to-day? Sometimes just putting words to it can help ease some of the weight.
